comment.body: I spent last night reading the daily chats from the beginning all the way through the first of this month in anticipation of Alma deleting them.  Three things jumped out at me (1) The number of times Alma gets asked the same question is really silly.  Usually it is by a new subscriber, but still…. (2) The amount of real estate wasted on “I don’t like Trump” or “I don’t like Putin (or Zelensky) comments is staggering.  Especially considering how that seems to be at the expense of real questions for Alma.  (3) The educational materials section remains very hard to find.  Alma, may I suggest that you make a chat like you did for OptionsDepth or Q&A, but where you link to your educational posts individually?
